message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 246 migrate 4 more storage read sites cx-first (approval/history/saved-search) (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Additional storage-read surface migration. 4 sites:

1. L7486 robot approve dispatch:
   `storage.get_approval_token_with_cx(&storage_cx, &code_hash)`
2. L28322 ft history:
   `storage.get_action_history_with_cx(&storage_cx, query)`
3. L15768 saved-search scheduler:
   `storage.list_saved_searches_with_cx(&storage_cx)`
4. L22910 ft search saved list:
   `storage.list_saved_searches_with_cx(&storage_cx)`
   (required restructuring the match-arm block nesting —
   SavedSearchCommands::List had a bare match-expression form
   that needed explicit block scoping for the cx binding)

Standard `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Cumulative main.rs cross-crate migration through tick 246: 102 sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
